stemHtml: Which of these statements about oxygen in transport aeroplanes is correct?

options.a: A chemical oxygen generator can be switched off.
options.b: A passenger oxygen mask contains a device to check if a flow of oxygen is present.
options.c: Chemical oxygen generators are used in the cockpit to supply the flight crew because of the low weight of this system.
options.d: If the automatic passenger oxygen mask presentation fails, there is no manual backup.
